# Synthetic Test Data

Only synthetic data is allowed here. Do not add real names, passports, INN, SNILS, phone numbers, addresses, or real candidate documents.

The MVP starts with text fixtures that are easy to review in Git. Later iterations should add generated DOCX/PDF fixtures based on these scenarios.

## Required Scenarios

1. `01-valid-21-point.txt`
2. `02-missing-foreign-passport-answer.txt`
3. `03-passport-without-issue-date.txt`
4. `04-missing-birth-place.txt`
5. `05-missing-citizenship.txt`
6. `06-missing-residence-permit-answer.txt`
7. `07-education-without-diploma-number.txt`
8. `08-travel-without-purposes.txt`
9. `09-criminal-one-common-no.txt`
10. `10-employment-gap-over-one-month.txt`
11. `11-employment-without-organization-address.txt`
12. `12-relative-without-citizenship.txt`
13. `13-relative-without-address.txt`
14. `14-residence-period-gap.txt`
15. `15-missing-contact.txt`
16. `16-legacy-doc-rejection.txt`
17. `17-pdf-without-text-layer.txt`
18. `18-legacy-20-point-form.txt`
19. `19-primary-21-point-form.txt`
20. `20-appendix-point-13.txt`
21. `21-appendix-point-14.txt`
